'''Anton Brunwin''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] front desk attendant at Lady [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]'s [[Lucky Despot]] hotel in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], along with their twin, [[Sturn Brunwin]]. The two were [[Scoundrel/Legends|swindlers]], and also ran a money laundering business in addition to working the front desk.<ref name="GG7" /> At some point, Anton was fired, and subsequently hired a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] to eliminate the group of punks that were apparently responsible.<ref name="SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Anton's Big Break}}</ref>
